title: Forge Migration
description: Schema for Forge CLI migration files. Compatible with MongoDB and PostgreSQL

migrationBlock.description: Each key is a collection or table name

validationLevel.description: MongoDB only. strict = validates all inserts and updates. moderate = only validates existing valid documents. off = disables validation

validationAction.description: MongoDB only. error = rejects invalid documents. warn = logs a warning but allows the operation

additionalProperties.description: MongoDB only. Allow additional fields in documents

createField.description: Create new fields. In MongoDB adds to $jsonSchema validator. In SQL adds columns to the table

alterField.description: Modify existing fields. In MongoDB updates the $jsonSchema validator. In SQL alters the column definition

dropField.description: Drop fields by name. In MongoDB removes from $jsonSchema. In SQL drops the column

createIndex.description: Create new indexes on the collection or table

dropIndex.description: Drop indexes by field name or index name

indexModel.description: MongoDB only. Raw index models for complex cases not covered by createIndex

dropCollection.description: Drop the entire collection or table. Recommended only in down blocks

type.description: Portable data type. The CLI converts to the correct type for each database engine

length.description: Max length. Applies to string and char types. Default 255 for string

nullable.description: Whether the field can be null

default.description: Default value for the field. Type must match the field type

primary.description: Mark field as primary key. In SQL adds PRIMARY KEY constraint. In MongoDB this is always _id

autoIncrement.description: SQL only. Auto increment for integer primary keys. Ignored in MongoDB

unsigned.description: SQL only. Marks numeric field as unsigned. Ignored in MongoDB

precision.description: Total number of digits for decimal and money types

scale.description: Number of digits after decimal point for decimal and money types

values.description: Required for enum type. List of allowed string values

description.description: Optional description or comment for the field

jsonSchema.description: Only for json type. Defines the internal structure of the JSON field. In MongoDB generates a nested $jsonSchema. In PostgreSQL documents the expected JSONB shape

items.description: Only for array type. Defines the type of each element in the array

then.description: values is required when type is enum

type.description: Portable data type of each array element

nullable.description: Whether the element can be null

jsonSchema.description: Only for json type. Defines the internal structure of each element

values.description: Required for enum type. List of allowed string values

oneOf.description: Compound index — all fields share the same index

field.description: Field name or array of fields for compound indexes

type.description: Index type. hashed, 2dsphere, 2d and wildcard are MongoDB only. Defaults to index

name.description: Custom name for the index. Auto-generated if omitted

unique.description: Enforce uniqueness on the indexed field or fields

sparse.description: MongoDB only. Only index documents that contain the field

nullable.description: Whether the indexed field allows null values

order.description: Index sort order. Converted to 1 (asc) or -1 (desc) internally

description.description: Optional description or comment for the index

background.description: MongoDB only. Build index in background without blocking the collection

expireAfterSeconds.description: MongoDB only. TTL in seconds. Only valid for date, datetime and timestamp fields

collation.description: Language-specific comparison rules for string fields

locale.description: BCP 47 language tag e.g. en, es, fr, zh

strength.description: 1 = case and accent insensitive. 2 = accent sensitive. 3 = case sensitive. 5 = identical

caseLevel.description: Include case comparison at strength level 1 or 2

numericOrdering.description: Compare numeric strings as numbers e.g. 10 > 9

alternate.description: Whether whitespace and punctuation are considered base characters

backwards.description: Accent marks sort from back of string. Used in French

indexModel.description: MongoDB only. Raw index model using Go driver v2 conventions

model.description: MongoDB index key document. Use 1 or -1 for order, or string for special index types

options.description: MongoDB CreateIndexesOptions from the Go driver v2

wildcardProjection.description: Fields to include or exclude for wildcard indexes

hidden.description: Hidden indexes are not used by the query planner
